name: adversarialbench
description: SQLite-backed adversarial LLM benchmark with matrix and head-to-head modes.

scripts.matrix:claude: npm run build && node dist/index.js matrix --config ./agents.claude.json
scripts.matrix: npm run build && node dist/index.js matrix --config ./agents.flagship.json
scripts.matrix:openai: npm run build && node dist/index.js matrix --config ./agents.openai.json
scripts.matrix:all: npm run build && node dist/index.js matrix --config ./agents.all.json
scripts.history: npm run build && node dist/index.js history
scripts.leaks: npm run build && node dist/index.js leaks
scripts.head-to-head: npm run build && node dist/index.js head-to-head
scripts.deploy:db: scp ./data/elo-test.db god@213.111.152.198:/opt/adversarialbench/data/adversarialbench.db && ssh god@213.111.152.198 'sudo systemctl restart adversarialbench' && echo 'DB deployed and service restarted'
scripts.simulate: npm run build && node dist/index.js matrix --config ./agents.example.json --offline
